title: Alimony
writer: Wyndham Gittens, E. Magnus Ingleton, Ashley T. Locke
actors: Grace Darmond, Warner Baxter, Ruby Miller
plot: Having helped her husband from their days of poverty to a period of unexpected wealth, Marion Mason sees other women entering his life. Misunderstanding leads to divorce, but she insists on a large alimony, which she uses to save ...
